Index.title: VoiceUp - Master English for your Tech Career
Index.subtitle: Stop letting language barriers hold back your engineering potential. Practice with NOVA, your AI English tutor.

speaking.title: Speaking Practice
speaking.novaGreeting: Hi there! I'm NOVA. What would you like to talk about today?
speaking.nudge: Take your time! I'm still listening...
speaking.notSupportedDesc: VoiceUp relies natively on Web Speech APIs. Please use Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge to access the conversation engine.

listening.title: Listening Practice
listening.followAlong: Click play — follow along and remember key details
listening.dictationDesc: Listen to the first sentence and type exactly what you hear
listening.wrongDictation: Not quite — listen again and try!

reading.instruction: Click any word to see its definition
reading.voiceDesc: Summarize what you just read in 30 seconds

writing.desc: Express your thoughts and get instant feedback

Onboarding.goalDesc: This helps us tailor NOVA's feedback for your specific journey.
Onboarding.novaIntro: Hi! I'm NOVA. What's your main goal?
Onboarding.timeTitle: How much time can you commit?
Onboarding.timeDesc: Consistency is better than intensity. Pick a realistic daily goal.
Onboarding.interviewDesc: If you don't have one, pick a target date to stay motivated.

Footer.tagline: The AI-powered, voice-first English learning platform designed to help you speak with confidence and land your dream job.

Hero.heading: Speak Your Way Into Your Dream Job.
Hero.subtext: Stop letting language barriers hold back your engineering potential. Practice with NOVA, your AI English tutor.

Problem.heading: Every other app lets you stay silent.
Problem.subtext: Typing "Hello" won't help you pass a speaking interview. Passive learning creates an illusion of progress.

Solution.heading: VoiceUp makes you speak.
Solution.subtext: Speak to NOVA, get instant grammar correction, and see your confidence soar in real-time.

HowItWorks.title: How it Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to fluency. It feels like chatting with a friend who happens to be a perfect English teacher.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Open your mic and talk naturally. No typing allowed.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: AI corrects your grammar and pronunciation instantly.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: See your fluency scores grow daily on your dashboard.

Features.title: Everything you need to master English
Features.subtitle: A complete ecosystem designed to make you fluent, confident, and ready for any conversation.
Features.novaDesc: Your personal English teacher available 24/7. NOVA understands your accent, corrects your grammar, and guides your learning journey with infinite patience.
Features.voiceDesc: Practice speaking naturally. No keyboards, no multiple-choice. Just your voice.
Features.scoringDesc: Get instant feedback on pronunciation, vocabulary, and grammar.
Features.challengesDesc: Build a streak and compete on leaderboards.
Features.roadmapDesc: A path tailored to your specific goals and career.
Features.certificatesDesc: Prove your fluency to employers with verified VoiceUp certificates.

NovaDemo.title: Real-time Grammar Correction
NovaDemo.subtitle: NOVA catches your mistakes and gently corrects you instantly, so you learn by doing.
NovaDemo.userMsg1: I am go to learn Python 🐍
NovaDemo.novaMsg1: Almost! Say: 'I am going to learn Python' 😊
NovaDemo.userMsg2: Can you help me for interview?
NovaDemo.novaMsg2: Sure! Try: 'Can you help me with my interview?' 🎯

Testimonials.title: Loved by learners worldwide
Testimonials.subtitle: Join 500,000+ people who found their voice with VoiceUp.
Testimonials.quote1: Got my dream job at a US startup. NOVA built my confidence to speak freely without translating in my head.
Testimonials.quote2: The real-time grammar correction is mind-blowing. It's like having a native speaker correct you gently.
Testimonials.quote3: I no longer fear English meetings. The practice loops and daily challenges forced me to speak.
Testimonials.quote4: I tried typing-based apps for years and couldn't speak. VoiceUp changed that in 3 months.
Testimonials.quote5: Perfect preparation for international conferences. Fast, effective, and actually fun to use.
Testimonials.quote6: VoiceUp's interview scenarios are exactly what you need. Zero anxiety now when taking calls.
Testimonials.quote7: The best English learning investment I've never had to pay for. Absolutely incredible.
Testimonials.quote8: Fluent English was the missing piece in my career. NOVA helped me find it.

CTA.heading: Start speaking English today.
CTA.subtext: Free forever. No credit card. No downloads. Just open your mic and let's talk.
CTA.socialProof: Join 500,000+ others already practicing with NOVA.
